title: digitalis hybrida
intro: Digitalis hybrida, also known as the hybrid foxglove, is a flowering plant that belongs to the foxglove family (Scrophulariaceae). The plant contains digoxin and digoxinin, compounds that have been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to their medicinal properties, primarily used to treat heart conditions such as atrial fibrillation and congestive heart failure. The health benefits of Digitalis hybrida include lowering blood pressure and improving the heart's ability to pump blood efficiently. Herbal preparations of the plant, including tinctures and extracts, are available, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using them, as they can be toxic in large doses.
